data.four_set_effect: When HP is below 70%, CRIT Rate increases by an additional 24%.

circlet_of_logos.desc: A hideous iron mask that has been left half-shattered from vicious battles.
circlet_of_logos.title: Berserker's Battle Mask

flower_of_life.desc: An exquisite flower that has been dyed red. It represents the qualities of the Berserker.
flower_of_life.title: Berserker's Rose

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: A goblet made from the bone of an unknown beast. It was taken as a trophy after some deadly encounter.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Berserker's Bone Goblet

plume_of_death.desc: An indigo feather from a legendary raven, part of which has been dyed crimson red.
plume_of_death.title: Berserker's Indigo Feather

sands_of_eon.desc: An instrument with an eternal flow that continues mercilessly within, reminding the Berserker of the limited time he has left — both on the battlefield as well as in the world.
sands_of_eon.title: Berserker's Timepiece

list.desc: In the days before the berserker descended into madness, he would sometimes pause in the rose garden for a moment to himself.</br>He had never had a family, nor had he a lover, or a friend.</br>When he was not on the battlefield, he would come here to tend to the fragile flowers in the garden with all his heart,</br>as if the crimson flowers buried in the thorns were the only warmth he could cling to.</br>
list.title: Berserker's Rose

list.desc: Bathed in the flames that devoured his homeland, the berserker's face was no longer recognizable.</br>The iron mask became joined with his flesh, permanently branding his face with a heartless countenance.</br>Then, in a fierce battle, his horrifying mask was split into two by his opponent.</br>The cracks of the mask tore apart the flesh that had long stuck to it.</br>But neither pain nor blood could stop the berserker's unfaltering footsteps.</br>The berserker kept roaring until the fresh blood covered the black clots hardened on his face.</br>
list.title: Berserker's Battle Mask

list.desc: The bloodthirsty berserker ravaged the lands, fighting humans and monsters alike, and even challenged the gods.</br>In a barren and lifeless land, he encountered a giant monster.</br>His iron mask could not conceal his rage, and so an endless fight ensued.</br>Hours, days, and years passed. The monster was finally defeated.</br>The berserker sucked out the marrow of the monster's broken horn. This was how the victor drank to his success.</br>
list.title: Berserker's Bone Goblet

list.desc: The once-sane berserker's homeland fell victim to the raging war between gods and mortals.</br>The rose garden burst into flames and birds of omen fed on the flesh of his countrymen.</br>Reborn in flames, vengeance and bloodlust took over the warrior's mind, turning him into a berserker.</br>Black feathers, scattered on the battlefield, were painted red by his rage as he took his revenge.</br>
list.title: Berserker's Indigo Feather

list.desc: The end inevitably comes for all, even the seemingly invincible berserker.</br>As the blood on his hands finally dried up, the berserker's footsteps began to falter.</br>His life was destined to end the moment he met his last challenger on the battlefield.</br>On the battlefield where blood flowed like rivers, his hourglass was painted red by the setting sun.</br>
list.title: Berserker's Timepiece
